title: the wand mod
description: this mod adds a wand with two spells left click is a explosion spell and right click is a normal blast explosion spells cost 25 durability while a blast spell only costs 5 durability
body: The Wand Mod introduces rare Power Stone ore spawning from Y55 down to Y5. Mine the crystals, craft a wand, and unleash magic: right‑click fires a precise blast, left‑click triggers a massive explosion spell that reshapes combat.
